note: eBAM acmt message flow validator: acmt.007/010/011/017/019 state machine per CGI-MP eBAM guide 2023.

vectors.name: valid_account_opening_sequence
vectors.description: acmt.007 (open request) → acmt.010 (ack referencing MSG-001) → OPENING_CONFIRMED, valid=true, 0 errors.

output_payload.table_source: CGI-MP eBAM Usage Guide 2023 v1.0; ISO 20022 acmt message catalogue (acmt.007.001.06 / acmt.010.001.04 / acmt.011.001.07 / acmt.017.001.05 / acmt.019.001.07); SWIFT eBAM SLA guidelines 2023
output_payload.regulatory_basis: CGI-MP eBAM Usage Guide 2023: acmt.007 AccountOpeningRequest / acmt.010 AccountRequestAcknowledgement / acmt.011 AccountModificationRequest / acmt.017 AccountClosureRequest / acmt.019 AccountReport state-machine. Each REQUEST must be followed by an ACK (acmt.010); REPORT (acmt.019) is permitted at any point. Gated chain routes on /acmt_state.
output_payload.pii_note: ZERO PII: message type codes, sequence numbers, account identifiers (synthetic/structural), and state machine fields only. No account holder, signatory, or personal data enters this kernel.
output_payload.not_legal_advice: Not legal or compliance advice. eBAM flow validation requires review by qualified treasury operations staff and the account servicer.

vectors.name: valid_account_closure_sequence
vectors.description: acmt.017 (closure request) → acmt.010 (ack) → acmt.019 (report) → CLOSURE_CONFIRMED, valid=true.

output_payload.table_source: CGI-MP eBAM Usage Guide 2023 v1.0; ISO 20022 acmt message catalogue (acmt.007.001.06 / acmt.010.001.04 / acmt.011.001.07 / acmt.017.001.05 / acmt.019.001.07); SWIFT eBAM SLA guidelines 2023

vectors.name: invalid_orphan_request
vectors.description: acmt.007 with no following acmt.010 acknowledgement → ORPHAN_REQUEST error, is_valid=false, acmt_state=INVALID.

validation_errors.detail: acmt.007 has no acmt.010 acknowledgement in the provided message set.
